programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: A New Hampshire town reels after police arrest four teenagers for robbing and murdering a 42-year-old mother and maiming her 11-year-old daughter; detectives uncover two suspects with the characteristics of sadistic psychopaths.

programs.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programs.desc: Investigators search a farm for a missing man and find a human leg bone on the property; the owner, Susan Monica, admits that her pigs ate her tenant alive, and he's not the only victim; Monica despises humans but loves her pigs.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programs.sub_title: The Child I Thought I Knew
programs.desc: A single mother overcoming addiction struggles to raise her son and daughter. Despite what appears to be a loving family and a sibling bond she could only hope for, she never could have foreseen the true monster that lies within her 13-year-old son.
